name: ardops-dev
description: Sitio profesional ardops.dev — DevOps Engineer (sitio estático).

scripts.html-validate: html-validate index.html blog/index.html blog/pipeline-seguridad-spec-driven.html talks/index.html speaking/index.html uses/index.html now/index.html privacy/index.html 404.html
scripts.build: npm run build:layout && npm run build:blog && npm run build:interviews
scripts.check:distribution: npm run check:feeds && npm run check:jsonld && npm run check:seo && npm run check:headshot && npm run check:now-freshness && npm run check:byte-budgets && npm run check:img-attrs && npm run check:fonts && npm run check:no-trackers && npm run check:no-cookies
scripts.check:security: npm run check:csp && npm run check:links && npm run check:sitemap
